---
title: "Featured Research"
listing:
  contents:
    - posts/hockey/2026-07-08-year-in-review/index.qmd
    - posts/volleyball/2026-07-08-mens-year-in-review/index.qmd
    - posts/volleyball/2026-07-08-womens-year-in-review/index.qmd
    - posts/baseball/2026-06-16-purdue-grad505-pitch-analytics/index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
---

The deeper, more rigorous pieces, as opposed to shorter notes. Each
entry is added here by hand, not by a category tag alone, use the
category filter above to narrow to a specific sport.

::: {.callout-note}
This page lists specific posts explicitly rather than filtering by the
`Featured` category tag automatically. Quarto's listing `categories`
option only renders a clickable filter widget, it doesn't restrict the
default view to a given tag, so a tag-based approach here would have
kept showing every post site-wide by default. Adding a new post here
means adding its path to this list.
:::
